case_title: DIANE QUINTANA VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINTANA, DIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION $2,270.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,385.00, THE JUDGMENT ADDRESSES THE ISSUE OF UNAUTHORIZED WITHDRAWLS ONLY. THE COURT DID NOT ADJUDICATE ANY ISSUE PERTAINING TO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM FOR REIMBURSMENT FOR OVERDRAFTS OR RETURNED CHECKS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY QUINTANA, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
